message:
feat(core): add From/TryFrom impls for Vec<T> on Value type + sync beads

Adds bidirectional conversion between Value::Array and typed Rust Vecs:

From impls (Vec<T> → Value::Array):
- Vec<String> → Array of Value::Text
- Vec<i32>    → Array of Value::Int
- Vec<i64>    → Array of Value::BigInt
- Vec<f64>    → Array of Value::Double
- Vec<bool>   → Array of Value::Bool

TryFrom impl (Value → Vec<T>):
- Generic Vec<T> extraction from Value::Array where T: TryFrom<Value>
- Returns TypeError with expected="ARRAY" on type mismatch

These impls enable ergonomic round-tripping of PostgreSQL/SQLite array
columns through the Value enum without manual iteration.

Beads sync: updated issue statuses for multiple tasks including agent
compatibility tests, console output separation, and plain mode coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
